collect_item.notes: Rapid series of chimes possibly meant to play when player finds secret statues

attack.notes: Possibly cut sound from Cesspool's leaping sword attack

misc: Three short sounds of unknown purpose
Similar sound to predecessor's bomb planting mechanic
Glitched version of Atlantis rising/sinking in opening/ending

notes: Source documentation focuses on unused graphics, cinematics, and sounds rather than musical composition. No tempo, key, chord progression, or melodic data documented. Audio analysis limited to existence of unused SFX and glitched sounds in ROM.
